Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Vroshir]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Vroshir are a threat to the Iterations under Abidan protection.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Vroshir are a group that resisted the power that rewound the Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Vroshir want to add worlds to their network.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Vroshir used a bullet with their entire will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Vroshir woman had an army of ghosts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Vroshir are conducting an attack on the Abidan.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Vroshir is a location containing the stronghold Tal’gullour.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Vroshir are an organization that liberates worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Vroshir relocate populations to massive Vroshir Homeworlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Vroshir locked eyes with the Abidan.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Vroshir used protective workings, barriers, and moon-sized guardian beasts to defend their ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Vroshir are bandits who seek bounty with minimal risk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Vroshir use war machines and fleets in their warfare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Vroshir had regained their momentum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Vroshir are a group that conducts raids and causes many deaths.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Vroshir are extending their reach and tightening a noose on Sector 11, Cradle, and the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Vroshir are introducing chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Vroshir created a trap that ambushed the Spiders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Vroshir are a group that saves human lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Vroshir are coming for Sector 11.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Vroshir can reach into the Way with a bone-gauntleted hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Vroshir are a group that tears open portals into the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — A Vroshir can sneak into Abidan territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Vroshir are a group that Ozriel expects will not discover his absence for decades.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — The Vroshir conducted an intrusion on Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Vroshir are an advancing force in various Sectors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — The Vroshir are an alliance of world-striding liberators who oppose the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Vroshir intervention is a suspected cause for interruptions in the Way.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Vroshir has a home-world called Tal’gullour.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Vroshir are a group that people rumored were targeting the location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Vroshir wants the contents of this world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel is a steadfast enemy of the Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — A thousand worlds have been looted or occupied by Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Vroshir cooperated with the Abidan to create OTEP.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
